steps.action: Open /register at 375x812 and capture the page
steps.expected: Register page matches login design language with rich background and polished form container
steps.observed: Register page showed the same dark-blue gradient background and elevated rounded form card style as login.

steps.action: Check viewport overflow metrics
steps.expected: No horizontal overflow
steps.observed: clientWidth, scrollWidth, and bodyScrollWidth were all 375.

evidence.network: No network requests were required after initial page load.

steps.action: Inspect search bars on Goods, Football, Basketball, and Concert tabs
steps.expected: Rounded search bars with icon treatment, subtle border/shadow, and consistent sizing
steps.observed: All four tabs exposed a 343x50 rounded search input with pill radius and subtle shadow; labels changed appropriately per surface.

steps.action: Check mobile overflow on each visited tab
steps.expected: No horizontal overflow on tab pages
steps.observed: Goods, Football, Basketball, and Concert pages stayed within the 375px viewport.

evidence.network: GET /api/products and GET /api/events?type=* completed during tab loads.

steps.action: Log in and record journey through home, product detail, football, and profile surfaces
steps.expected: Pages feel visually consistent with no jarring transitions or layout shifts
steps.observed: Recorded journey showed consistent typography, gradient accents, rounded cards, and persistent visual language across the authenticated path.

steps.action: Review ending profile surface and intermediate screenshots
steps.expected: No obvious FOUC or broken transitions
steps.observed: No obvious flash-of-unstyled-content was seen; transitions remained visually coherent during manual playback.

evidence.network: Journey included successful auth, products, and football event fetches.

assertions.title: Design token consistency across all pages

steps.action: Compare login, register, goods, profile, VIP, and orders surfaces
steps.expected: Shared primary color, font, radius, and shadow system across pages
steps.observed: Pages consistently used Inter, rounded inputs/cards, blue gradient accents, and the same elevated shadow language.

steps.action: Cross-check with captured card/button styling
steps.expected: No obviously ad-hoc styling on visited pages
steps.observed: Buttons and cards reused the same radius and shadow patterns throughout the tested public surfaces.

evidence.network: Visual-only comparison; no extra network requirements.

assertions.title: Mobile viewport (375px) no horizontal overflow

steps.action: Measure scrollWidth versus clientWidth on visited pages
steps.expected: scrollWidth equals clientWidth on every tested public surface
steps.observed: Login, register, goods, football, basketball, concert, profile, orders, VIP, and product detail stayed within 375px.

steps.action: Inspect event detail page width
steps.expected: Event detail also fits within viewport
steps.observed: Event detail at /events/cmn6xwlr50008l0g5r9xk0dga reported clientWidth 375 and scrollWidth 376, indicating horizontal overflow.

assertions.issues: Event detail page exceeded viewport width by 1px at mobile size.

assertions.title: No functional regression

steps.action: Log in with test@example.com / password123
steps.expected: Authentication succeeds and redirects to authenticated home
steps.observed: Credentials login succeeded, redirected to /, and product data loaded successfully.

steps.action: Navigate through core authenticated pages and logout
steps.expected: Navigation, data fetching, and logout work without regressions
steps.observed: Navigation and logout worked, but direct event detail route /events/cmn6xwlrj0009l0g5cyf7eiuk returned 'Event not found', and order records initially rendered a Loading state before settling.

evidence.consoleErrors: Only development warnings were present; no fatal runtime error surfaced.
evidence.network: POST /api/auth/callback/credentials, POST /api/auth/signout, GET /api/products, GET /api/events?type=*, and GET /api/events/:id were observed.

assertions.issues: A directly tested event detail ID returned 'Event not found', so not all tested event-detail functionality behaved cleanly.

steps.action: Open /login and capture the mobile view
steps.expected: Gradient/rich background with elevated rounded form container
steps.observed: Login page displayed a rich blue gradient background with a rounded, shadowed form card and clear content hierarchy.

steps.action: Check viewport width metrics
steps.expected: No horizontal overflow
steps.observed: clientWidth, scrollWidth, and bodyScrollWidth were all 375.

assertions.title: Home banner carousel auto-play and indicators

steps.action: Record the home page carousel for 6.5 seconds
steps.expected: Carousel auto-plays with visible indicators updating to the active slide
steps.observed: Carousel recording showed automatic slide progression with three visible dot controls and looping behavior.

steps.action: Capture a still frame
steps.expected: Indicators visibly rendered on the banner
steps.observed: Banner screenshot shows the dot indicators beneath the hero.

evidence.network: Home page product/image requests loaded while recording.

steps.action: Inspect goods grid cards on the home page
steps.expected: Rounded cards with shadow, consistent imagery, bold price, and spacing
steps.observed: Goods cards appeared in a uniform grid with rounded corners, elevated styling, strong price emphasis, and consistent image blocks.

steps.action: Confirm page width on mobile
steps.expected: No horizontal overflow
steps.observed: Goods page remained at scrollWidth 375.

evidence.network: GET /api/products and image requests loaded successfully.

steps.action: Open a product detail page from the goods grid
steps.expected: Large hero image, bold price, and touch-friendly action buttons
steps.observed: Detail page showed a full-width image about 365px tall on an 812px viewport and 64px-tall rounded For sale/Purchase buttons.

steps.action: Check mobile overflow metrics
steps.expected: Contained within the viewport
steps.observed: Product detail scrollWidth matched 375px.

evidence.network: Product detail opened from goods surface without failed requests.

assertions.title: Football match cards VS layout with country flags

steps.action: Open /football and inspect the match list
steps.expected: Cards show VS matchup layout with prominent country flags or clear country markers
steps.observed: Football cards displayed clear country-vs-country matchups using large flag emojis and polished 343px-wide cards.

steps.action: Check card/search sizing on mobile
steps.expected: Search bar and cards fit the viewport
steps.observed: Football search bar measured 343x50 and the page stayed at scrollWidth 375.

assertions.title: Basketball match cards distinctive design

steps.action: Open /basketball and compare against football cards
steps.expected: Basketball cards have a distinctive team-focused visual treatment
steps.observed: Basketball cards rendered as mostly plain text rows with emoji markers and no visible card radius, shadow, or differentiated background.

steps.action: Inspect computed card styling
steps.expected: Rounded/shadowed card treatment
steps.observed: Measured basketball event links reported radius 0px and box-shadow none.

assertions.issues: Basketball cards did not present the distinctive polished card treatment required by the assertion.

assertions.title: Concert cards with visual treatment on imagery

steps.action: Open /concert and inspect event cards
steps.expected: Concert cards use imagery with overlay/color treatment for readable text
steps.observed: Concert items displayed text and emoji only, without visible image panels or overlay treatment.

steps.action: Inspect computed card styling
steps.expected: Rounded, shadowed, image-treated cards
steps.observed: Measured concert event links reported radius 0px, shadow none, and no background image.

assertions.issues: Concert cards lacked the specified imagery and overlay-based visual treatment.

assertions.title: My profile gradient header and stat cards

steps.action: Open /my after login and capture the page
steps.expected: Gradient header, circular avatar, and elevated stat/menu cards
steps.observed: Profile page showed a blue gradient header, an 80x80 circular avatar placeholder, a rounded elevated stats card, and a rounded elevated menu container.

steps.action: Check overflow metrics
steps.expected: No horizontal overflow
steps.observed: Profile page scrollWidth matched 375px.

assertions.title: Order record page tab design and order cards

steps.action: Open /my/orders and inspect purchase/for-sale tabs
steps.expected: Highlighted active tab and populated order cards with thumbnail, title, price, and status badge
steps.observed: Tabs switched correctly and used 44px-tall pills, but the page initially showed Loading... and no populated order cards or status badges were present in either captured state.

steps.action: Toggle to For Sale and capture both views
steps.expected: Both tabs show styled order cards
steps.observed: For Sale view still lacked visible order card content in the captured mobile surface.

evidence.network: Order page rendered but captured UI did not show completed order data.

assertions.issues: Expected styled order cards with thumbnails, price, and badges were not visible in the tested mobile flows.

assertions.title: VIP page tiers with visual differentiation

steps.action: Open /my/vip and capture the full page
steps.expected: All 8 tiers visually differentiated with current tier highlighted
steps.observed: VIP page listed eight tiers with distinct gradient headers, elevated cards, and VIP2 highlighted using a stronger outline treatment and CURRENT label.

steps.action: Inspect tier card styling
steps.expected: Premium visual differentiation between tiers
steps.observed: Tier cards showed varied gradient backgrounds and shadowed 12px-radius containers.

evidence.network: VIP page rendered from authenticated surface without failures.

assertions.title: Event detail pages polished layout

steps.action: Open a football event detail route and inspect hierarchy
steps.expected: Full-width image, clear title/date/venue hierarchy, spacing, and consistent action buttons
steps.observed: The working event detail route showed title/venue/price hierarchy and consistent 64px action buttons, but no rendered image element was present.

steps.action: Check mobile width on the event detail page
steps.expected: Page remains fully contained in viewport
steps.observed: The event detail page measured scrollWidth 376 versus clientWidth 375.

evidence.network: GET /api/events/:id requests succeeded for the working detail route.

assertions.issues: Event detail lacked the specified full-width hero image and also overflowed horizontally by 1px.

frictions.description: The referenced .factory/library/user-testing.md guidance file was not present in the environment.
frictions.resolution: Followed the mission AGENTS.md testing guidance and the task-specific isolation rules instead.

frictions.description: A full user-journey recording had to be split into two files because the initial recording attempt stopped after a ref-refresh interruption.
frictions.resolution: Preserved the first partial recording and captured the remaining journey in a second recording file.

summary: Tested 17 assigned assertions on the real mobile UI: 10 passed and 7 failed. Key failures were event-detail horizontal overflow and missing imagery, plain basketball/concert card treatments, and missing populated order-card evidence on the order record page.
